title: Gooey Spanish Wrap
description: A fusion of gooey cheese, savory Spanish chorizo, and spicy horseradish in a crispy tortilla wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add sliced chorizo and cook until crispy, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove chorizo from skillet and set aside.
4. Add 1 tbsp of horseradish sauce to the skillet and stir to coat.
5. Add shredded cheese to the skillet and stir until melted and gooey.
6. Warm the tortilla wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Assemble the wrap by placing the chorizo, cheese mixture, and chopped cilantro onto the tortilla.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
